index.title: Priyam Parashar
index.content:
Welcome to my homepage. I write about tech, science, art, books, philosophy and any other thing that I have been thinking about.
About Me
I am a roboticist working with FAIR at Meta. Previously I did my Ph.D. at UC San Diego under Dr. Henrik I. Christensen and Dr. Ashok K. Goel (Georgia Tech). I have spent my time at UC San Diego, Georgia Tech, CMU and IIIT Hyderabad making friends and meeting seriously amazing people.
